measure.CatchLine: Repeals sunset of homestead property tax deferral program.
measure.MeasureSummary:
Repeals sunset of homestead property tax deferral program. Authorizes late filing of claim for deferral with payment of late fee. Modifies determination of maximum number of new claims allowable for property tax year. Requires timely and late-filed claims to establish eligibility as of April 15 of year in which claim is filed. Modifies requirement that, upon receipt of deed to homestead after foreclosure, county treasurer pay to Department of Revenue interest accrued on amount of deferred taxes. 
	Takes effect on 91st day following adjournment sine die.
measure.RelatingToFull: Relating to the homestead property tax deferral program; creating new provisions; amending ORS 311.670, 311.672 and 311.694 and section 24, chapter 723, Oregon Laws 2011; and prescribing an effective date.
measure.RelatingTo: Relating to the homestead property tax deferral program; prescribing an effective date.
measure.AtTheRequestOf: (at the request of Governor Kate Brown for Department of Revenue)
measure.FiscalImpact: May have fiscal impact, but no statement yet issued
measure.RevenueImpact: May have revenue impact, but no statement yet issued

sponsors.PresessionFiledMessage: Introduced and printed pursuant to House Rule 12.00.  Presession filed

historyActions.ActionText: First reading. Referred to Speaker's desk.
